name: Research Operator
description: Grounded research, evidence gathering, and operator-facing synthesis surfaces.
starter_prompt: Research this topic with current sources, then give me the grounded answer and the key links
guide_steps: Ask the question directly in chat and let Somi decide the evidence path.
Open the Control Room if you want to inspect artifacts, follow-up context, and workflow state.
Reuse the research digest workflow when the task repeats.
quick_actions: Ask a latest/research question in chat
